Team.title: Team
Team.description: A major team within the Mac Eagles organization.

name.description: Name of the team (Science, Programming, Engineering).

description.description: Brief description of the team's focus.

color.description: Hex color code for team branding.

Assignment.title: Assignment
Assignment.description: A specific task assigned to a team member.

teamId.description: The ID of the team this assignment belongs to.

subTeamId.description: The ID of the sub-team this assignment belongs to (e.g., Computer Science, Science).

importance.description: Importance level (1-5) for advancing car progress.

assignedTo.description: Name of the team member responsible.
